agent: speckit.taskstoissues

# Convert Tasks to GitHub Issues

Create one GitHub issue for each MealCraft task.

Format:

## Title

Short descriptive title

## Description

Describe the feature to be implemented.

## Acceptance Criteria

List all measurable requirements.

## Labels

Examples:

- feature
- enhancement
- authentication
- database
- ui
- api

Generate issues for Tasks 1-23 from the project backlog.
---
